title: Pwoe
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Pwoe |homeworld=[[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Turquoise]] |skin=Orange |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Advisory Council]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|This is the sort of thing that can only happen when the chain of command is not clear.''"
"''It's clear enough. Pwoe chose to disregard it, is all.|[[Vana Dorja]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''}} '''Pwoe''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] and who proclaimed himself [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall of Coruscant]]. ==Biography== At the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Pwoe was the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] and served on [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s [[New Republic Advisory Council|Advisory Council]]. He was also one of the anti-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] members of the Council. His election to the Senate was a surprise, as almost everyone believed that Mon Calamari would continue to elect [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] representatives; some suspected that Fey'lya was responsible for his rise, probably as an attempt to ward off an appointment of [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] to the Advisory Council. Pwoe's ambition made him a natural competitor against Fey'lya's political greed, lending strength to rumors that Fey'lya pushed for his inclusion on the Advisory Council as an insult to the Mon Calamari despite the political threat Pwoe represented. After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] and the death of Fey'lya, Pwoe, [[Chelch Dravvad]], [[Niuk Niuv]], and [[Fyor Rodan]] were the only Council members to reach [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]. Pwoe seized the opportunity and declared himself [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]]. He also declared that [[Cal Omas]] and [[Triebakk]] had been killed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], though [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] briefly wondered if they hadn't been left behind. With the support of the three remaining Council members, Pwoe ordered [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to sacrifice Borleias to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to allow the Council time to escape. Pwoe, however, was planning to buy time to surrender to the Yuuzhan Vong. When Senators Omas and Triebakk resurfaced on Mon Calamari with most of the Senate, they called all surviving members to elect a new Chief of State. Pwoe, fearing for his political survival, angrily ordered the Senate to convene on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] to ''confirm'' his appointment. At this point, the other Council members realized his personal intentions. The Council abandoned Pwoe, the Senate rebuked him, and the Quarren withdrew his Senatorial status. In the subsequent [[New Republic Presidential election, 28 ABY|election]] on Mon Calamari, Pwoe received three votes, but he declared the election illegal and those participating traitors. Cal Omas was elected, and his support diminished even further. ===Struggle on Ylesia=== {{Quote|Up until now I'd thought the ''Jedi ''were the most pompous, annoying gasbags in creation, but that was before I met ''you. ''You take the prize for the most preposterous, self-important, prolix fiasco I have ever seen. And on top of thatㅡ On top of that, sir, you are a ''fish''! So sit down and shut up, before I take a ''harpoon'' to you!|[[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] to Senator Pwoe|''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''}} Pwoe, cut off from his ever dwindling supporters, attempted to make a separate [[Pwoe–Sal-Solo Treaty|peace treaty]] with the [[Peace Brigade]] and [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]], but was arrested by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tigran Jamiro/Legends|Tigran Jamiro's]] forces when the New Republic [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|attacked]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. When the New Republic column was attacked by the Yuuzhan Vong, he was injured when a [[razor bug]] severed one of his tentacles. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=starwars/article.asp?x=sw20020228adiplomacy|text=Diplomacy and Daggers}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] (with [[Gron Marrab]]) |years=c. [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]]–[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] |before=[[Cilghal]] |after=[[Gron Marrab]] }} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |years=(self-proclaimed)
[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] |before=[[Borsk Fey'lya]] |before-years=[[23 ABY/Legends|23]]–[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] |after=[[Cal Omas]] |after-years=[[27 ABY/Legends|27]]–[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] }} {{EndBox}} {{Interlang |de=Pwoe |es=Pwoe }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Senators]] [[Category:Peace Brigaders]] [[Category:Quarren]]
